# OnlineMarketingAgency.ca

> Canadian digital marketing agency helping local small businesses get more calls, bookings, and customers through Google Ads, SEO, Local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, website design, social media ads, and lead generation. Serving businesses across Canada since 2020. Phone: 905-626-9919. Free marketing audit available.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2020
- Service area: Canada (Ontario, BC, Alberta, Quebec) with a focus on the Greater Toronto Area
- Rated 4.9/5 by clients
- Pricing: ads management from $199/month plus ad spend; websites from $499
- Contact: info@onlinemarketingagency.ca · 905-626-9919

## Services
- [Google Ads Management](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/google-ads-management): Search campaigns, keyword strategy, conversion tracking, and reporting for local businesses.
- [SEO Services](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/seo-services): Organic search growth through technical SEO, content, and link building.
- [Local SEO Services](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/local-seo-services): Google Maps and "near me" visibility, citations, and local content.
- [Google Business Profile Optimization](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/google-business-profile-optimization): Map pack ranking, reviews, and profile management.
- [Website Design for Small Business](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/website-design-for-small-business): Fast, mobile-friendly, conversion-focused websites from $499.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/social-media-marketing-agency): Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns for local demand.
- [Lead Generation](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/lead-generation-agency): End-to-end systems that turn clicks into calls and form submissions.

## Industries served
- [Barbershop Marketing](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/barber-marketing-agency)
- [Contractor Marketing](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/contractor-marketing-agency)
- [Clinic Marketing](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/clinic-marketing-agency)
- [Restaurant Marketing](https://onlinemarketingagency.ca/restaurant-marketing-agency)
